name: For you, from SherrodBrown.com
subject: final days, final dollars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | You've heard a lot from our campaign over the past year. We both know the stakes of this election and how critical it is we re-elect Sherrod to the Senate. We've seen dark money, special interests, and the GOP pour money into attack ads against Sherrod and his family. Throughout it all, this grassroots team has proudly stood with Sherrod. **Thank you.** [**We're in the final days now, and every dollar will be the difference. With 48 hours until our last monthly deadline, we're still $6,100 short of our goal. All donations are being TRIPLED -- so get yours in tonight.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd0f/4462dc26/70f437ef/201f12d7/561569327/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181029pm?refcode=sbe181029pm_a") [**Give $5 -> $15**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd0f/4462dc26/70f437ef/201f12d6/561569327/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181029pm?refcode=sbe181029pm_a&amount=5") [**Give $10 -> $30**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd0f/4462dc26/70f437ef/201f12d5/561569327/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181029pm?refcode=sbe181029pm_a&amount=10") [**Match our $26 average online contribution -> $78**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd0f/4462dc26/70f437ef/201f12d4/561569327/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181029pm?refcode=sbe181029pm_a&amount=26") Peter -- eight days from now when the election is over, we'll give your inbox a break. But right now, **your contributions can have triple the impact.** And with our turnout efforts in full swing, all contributions make a big difference. [**Give whatever you can to get us to this $400,000 goal. We need funds to ramp up our field program and turn out as many voters in the final days.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd0f/4462dc26/70f437ef/201f12d7/561569327/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181029pm?refcode=sbe181029pm_a") | | | [Donate](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd0f/4462dc26/70f437ef/201f12d7/561569327/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181029pm?refcode=sbe181029pm_a")
---
Thanks for everything,
Justin
Justin Barasky
Campaign Manager

name: Molly Kelly for Governor
subject: Obama. Biden. Shaheen. Hassan.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
The consensus is clear, friends: **We _need_ Molly Kelly as New Hampshire's next governor.**
**President Obama said so. Vice President Biden said so. And so did Senators Jeanne Shaheen, Maggie Hassan, Kirsten Gillibrand, Elizabeth Warren and Kamala Harris.** They all know how close we are to flipping New Hampshire blue and putting a Democrat back in the corner office.
But dark money groups like the Koch network are attacking Molly at every turn - and with _just eight days left to go_ in this campaign, hitting every goal has never been more important.

**We CAN fight back and win this thing, but ONLY if you give right now to help us close this $4,089 gap.**
**Since Molly isn 't taking donations from corporate special interests (unlike her opponent), we can only win this election in eight days with grassroots donors like you.**
**Please, friends, it's now or never: [Will you rush $5 or more right now - every dollar you can - to flip NH blue and take back the corner office for Democrats?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4aa4/d0ce7de/50df6d95/9cddca3/972748429/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjQzLWZyLW5kLW5oIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk243-fr-nd-nh&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

Help Us Celebrate Victory!
It's almost the big day: Election Day is now one week away!

And while Election Day might have you busy at your job, working the polls, or supporting your favorite candidate, we invite you to join your Indiana Republican Party after the polls close for a victory celebration (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/indiana-republican-election-night-party-tickets-51968474105?aff=odeimcmailchimp&mc_cid=396292b2a8&mc_eid=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=0bfb46e809&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

Join U.S. Senate candidate Mike Braun, Secretary of State Connie Lawson, Auditor Tera Klutz and Treasurer Kelly Mitchell!

The party starts at 6 p.m. at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis. RSVP now (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/indiana-republican-election-night-party-tickets-51968474105?aff=odeimcmailchimp&mc_cid=396292b2a8&mc_eid=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=0bfb46e809&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , and we'll see you there!

name: tinaforminnesota.com
subject: We know what happens next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We know what happens if Republicans and Trump stay in control in Washington.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181029PM_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, here's the thing. We know what happens if Republicans and Trump stay in control in Washington. They will try to cut Medicare and Social Security to pay for their corporate tax cuts. They will try again -- and maybe succeed -- in repealing health care. And McConnell will try to stack the courts with as many right-wing judges as he can find. Our choice in this moment is clear: Fight back with every ounce of energy we have, or let special interests and big right-wing donors buy another election -- and with it the conservative agenda in Washington they want so badly. **[Make a contribution before midnight so we can stop Republicans from turning this Senate seat red. Your contribution now shows you are fighting back against the extreme conservative agenda of Trump and Mitch McConnell.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. name: Stacey Abrams
subject: These are not dark times. These are awakening times.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Yesterday was "Souls to the Polls" Sunday. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa753/34a064cc/a83b92/70ca9ec/2992316444/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Dear Friend - Yesterday was "Souls to the Polls" Sunday, the day when people of faith and all those with faith in Georgia march in solidarity to cast their ballots. [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa753/34a064cc/a83b92/70ca9ed/2992316444/VEsE/ "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/vote/") I was honored to join Fulton County voters, activist and award-winning artist Common, and civil rights legend Ambassador Andrew Young to lead the march - but something Ambassador Young said still sits with my spirit: _"We are Believers. You are here on a Sunday because you believe in Georgia. Because somebody's been praying for you for a long time, or you wouldn't have made it this far._ **_But now it's your turn to take over._**_And the souls gathered here on this Sunday are going to work every single day to make Stacey's vision real and make our Georgia better for all of us. Because with Leader Abrams, working with you, it will be better."_ [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa753/34a064cc/a83b92/70ca9ed/2992316444/VEsF/ "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/vote/") We often say we stand on the shoulders of giants, and we do. Georgians are part of a rich and complicated history of civil rights. Our ancestors marched because they saw something in the future that they wanted to fight for and hold on to. And as a former congressman, UN Ambassador, and Mayor of Atlanta, Ambassador Young helped lead the way. But now, with only 8 days until Election Day, it is "our turn to take over." It's time to stand up and fight for ourselves. Because the same powers - the same roadblocks to progress, the same voter suppression efforts our ancestors fought against and beat back decades ago - are alive and well today. **But these are not dark times. These are awakening times. So please, make a plan to vote early this week. Early voting closes the evening of Friday, November 2nd, and we need your ballots cast and your hands knocking on doors before our final weekend.** **[FIND YOUR EARLY VOTING LOCATION NOW](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa753/34a064cc/a83b92/70ca9ed/2992316444/VEsC/ "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/vote/")** With our eyes set on progress and our feet marching forward, we are on the road to victory. But our victory is contingent upon all of us stepping up to vote early and volunteer this week. Let's get it done. Stacey Abrams
---
**[VOLUNTEER](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa753/34a064cc/a83b92/70ca9ea/2992316444/VEsD/ "http://bit.ly/DemVolEvents")**

|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa753/34a064cc/a83b92/70ca9eb/2992316444/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/stacey.abrams.77/") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa753/34a064cc/a83b92/70ca9e8/2992316444/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/staceyabrams") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa753/34a064cc/a83b92/70ca9e9/2992316444/VEsO/ "https://www.instagram.com/staceyabrams/")

name: Linda (personal)
subject: I call out lies when I see them
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
I need you to join to me to help Democrats set the record straight. Peter, politics is supposed to be a healthy exchange of ideas. But we can't have that when one side blatantly lies about their positions!

Republicans are trying to convince the American people that they are the party to be entrusted with protecting health insurance coverage for those with pre-existing conditions.

[**If you 're fed up with lies like this, then I need you to join me to help Democrats set the record straight. Donate so we can hit our final pre-election goal of $20,000!**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare-fwd_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Voters have a choice on November 6: a party that will expand Medicaid and works to further enhance access to affordable care or a party that's spent the last 8 years trying to roll back Obamacare.

To make it clear to every last undecided voter what that choice is, I'm working to help Democratic challengers in some of the closest races in the country. And it takes resources to make sure these campaigns can get out the vote!

[**So will you stand with me in this critical final stretch? We need to raise $17,806 more by our November 5 deadline!**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare-fwd_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you so much,

Linda

**\---- ORIGINAL MESSAGE ----**
> Peter, this would be hilarious if it weren't so outrageously false:
>
> **In the final days of this election, Republicans are running on a message that _they_ are the party who will protect coverage for pre-existing conditions.**
>
> We can't let them lie their way out of this one. In these last 8 days before all votes are cast, Linda's working to call out the Republicans for their endless attempts to undermine Americans' access to affordable healthcare.
>
> **[Will you donate to help Linda reach her FINAL pre-election goal of $20,000 before midnight on November 5?](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare-fwd_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ******[Chip in $10 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036693/4ac3d62d/6a0a5c3a/1ce29ba2/1782090810/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare-fwd_EM")******
> ---
> ******[Chip in $25 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036693/4ac3d62d/6a0a5c3a/1ce29ba3/1782090810/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare-fwd_EM")******
> ******[Chip in $50 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036693/4ac3d62d/6a0a5c3a/1ce29ba0/1782090810/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare-fwd_EM")******
> ******[Chip in $100 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036693/4ac3d62d/6a0a5c3a/1ce29ba1/1782090810/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare-fwd_EM")******
> ******[Chip in $250 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036693/4ac3d62d/6a0a5c3a/1ce29ba6/1782090810/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare-fwd_EM")******
> ******[Or donate another amount>>](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare-fwd_EM&recurring=auto&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")******
> Here's the truth Republicans don't want you to hear:
> 1. They voted to overturn the Affordable Care Act and replace it with a terrible plan that would have made coverage for pre-existing conditions unaffordable for millions of Americans.
>
>
> 2. The Trump Administration is _suing in federal court_ to overturn the ACA's requirement that health insurers cover pre-existing conditions.
>

> This is an election that will determine the future of healthcare in this country. If the Republicans keep control of Congress, they will continue their work to roll back the ACA.
>
> **A Democratic House will stop these efforts once and for all.**
>
> Linda needs your help to push our message in these final 8 days: that Democrats are the party that brought coverage for millions of Americans, and that we will never stop protecting that coverage.
>
> [**Her work will help Democrats in California and around the country close strong in the districts that will decide control of the House. Please donate what you can to help us reach our goal today!**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181029_Healthcare-fwd_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
>
> Thank you,
>
> Team Sanchez

You can contribute to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez by [**donating here.**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036693/4ac3d62d/6a0a5c3a/1ce29ba4/1782090810/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ls_support?refcode=footer&amount=25.00&recurring=auto")
Contributions or gifts to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez are not tax deductible.

[**Click here**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036693/4ac3d62d/6a0a5c3a/1ce29bba/1782090810/VEsHBg/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages and enter dpwillis67@gmail.com so we can unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: thank you, Congressman Lewis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
It is a sincere honor to serve this country alongside Congressman Lewis in our nation's capital, and it is a deep honor to earn his support in my re-election race.
Friends, I hope you can take a moment to read Congressman John Lewis's kind note below. It is a sincere honor to serve this country alongside Congressman Lewis in our nation's capital, and it is a deep honor to earn his support in my re-election race. [**I hope you will join Congressman Lewis in supporting my campaign with a donation of any size, friends.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.29_b3_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") As he noted, winning this race is critical to Democrats' chance of regaining the House majority and providing a crucial check on the White House. My final end-of-month fundraising deadline of this race is coming up on Wednesday at midnight, and my team tells me we have quite a bit of money to raise. [**Every dollar will go toward keeping AZ-01 blue, so please do chip in if you can.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.29_b3_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Yours, Tom \-----forwarded message----- From: Congressman John Lewis Subject: my colleague Tom Friends, I have devoted my life to the cause of fighting for justice. Over my career in Congress, I have had the pleasure of serving with colleagues who share my commitment to ensuring that all Americans are treated equally under the law -- _and one such colleague is Tom O 'Halleran._ **Since he arrived in Congress, Tom has maintained a relentless focus on standing up for working families in Arizona.** He has been a partner in keeping the current Administration accountable and he is a fighter for his constituents and for our nation's democratic values. But Tom faces a tough fight for re-election this fall, and he needs our support to ensure that he can keep up the fight in Congress. [**Friends, will you help my friend Tom win this fall with a donation today, ahead of his important fundraising deadline on Wednesday?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.29_b3_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") It is imperative that Tom win re-election this fall, friends, because Arizona families deserve his independent voice serving them in Washington. His far-right opponent would be a rubber-stamp for the current Administration and all its worse abuses. **Keeping AZ-01 blue in November is also critical to winning the House majority** \-- and winning the majority will allow Democrats to provide a desperately needed, independent check on the White House. [**So, please consider supporting my valued colleague today with a donation before his important deadline on Wednesday.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.29_b3_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you, Congressman John Lewis | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.29_b3_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
---

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [_clicking here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633de0/1a8421e1/19b002e3e/496aee11/649904761/VEsB/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/update-your-information").

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633de0/1a8421e1/19b002e3e/496aee12/649904761/VEsO/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonians. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633de0/1a8421e1/19b002e3e/496aee13/649904761/VEsP/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe"). If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633de0/1a8421e1/19b002e3e/496aee14/649904761/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleran?refcode=email_footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000"). Thanks for having Tom's back!

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: This is serious.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
We could lose the House. |
---
| | | | | | | **[Authorized By Trump Headquarters](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=78dee7435391e31f2536a40bd42c5e17e4aad38a0c452586cb40cee2a11859652724b90feb5382e5bb3c1fbbaf82f93c808d4815d7cfb08d)**
---
|

Friend,

I was one of the conservatives who believed President Trump could win the White House. The energy in our country in October 2016 was like nothing I had ever witnessed. _I knew the polls were missing something._

I want you to know that I'm not one to be swayed by doomsday polls put out by the media. _But I must admit that I 'm concerned that our House Majority could be in jeopardy._

Races are too close for comfort. The Left is fired up. _With our final end-of-month deadline coming up, this is our moment to fight or _lose.__

**Please make a contribution to help the President invest in the most important races that will decide the fate of the people 's House -- _and ultimately even the White House._**
**ALL CONTRIBUTIONS QUADRUPLE MATCHED** [CONTRIBUTE $20 = $100](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=78dee7435391e31f7b9626d5b5198fa117a9616202b248075d57806d38c929fcbac7f21cec6573e4751e622537b29ff1748cd4bc65d36c26) [CONTRIBUTE $15 = $75](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=78dee7435391e31f10dd738d008f676c49334e491614ecc45900576b79c827936e47c5e05740a024651d75ee241030dd38c24e29dbe4686c) [CONTRIBUTE $10 = 50](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=78dee7435391e31f289ec4535a0a34609de832d582bc087a99f9aef42888a6ef101ae14e801290d9887529f0740292281ddb834e3590ca75) [CONTRIBUTE $5 = $25](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=78dee7435391e31fca6576ae33be257a3da626dc009458ca468de44ed0ded7fce7831a0c55379adafc2bc39a00661df92bf389a9d7a17339) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=78dee7435391e31f4cb674861c536f49178e1825a8d7497c4df7f8a6fd6b99ebc95a695b47570ca0cff247a278486718a9c0c87479810e0a)
**As Speaker of the House, Nancy Pelosi would be third in line for the presidency.**

All work that has been done to secure funding for the wall, provide resources for border security, slash Obama's regulations, grow our economy, cut taxes, and protect miners, farmers, and all workers would be lost.

Instead, Democrats would use the people's House as a weapon to attack President Trump.

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: Patronis' biggest donor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/tqwThV-W9vdBMizpa7-Tye0qKpXulQ-2cS_UImN_P9o=/H1CVUiLx9x5Zp-i6uwrMQ3djkeCmBOyIEZ2I9lOJ2PI=) Friends and Neighbors -- Recently, **[_Politico_ ran a very interesting piece](https://act.myngp.com/el/tqwThV-W9vdBMizpa7-Tye0qKpXulQ-2cS_UImN_P9o=/5Yh0dE6mvXVRn7pdYcoeLcjJbvrbXdvLKG2fzd7RZz4=)** about a North Carolina based investor named Greg Lindberg.

Per the article, Lindberg is being targeted in a federal investigation of "drug offenses, crimes against financial institutions, or money laundering crimes". He is also one of Florida's largest individual Republican political donors this cycle, giving to a range of officials and committees supporting GOP candidates - including Rick Scott **and our current Chief Financial Officer (CFO), Jimmy Patronis.** While it's important to note that Patronis' team claims to have had no prior knowledge of this investigation or Lindberg's suspicious business background, there has apparently been no effort on the campaign's part to return his contributions, either, in light of it**.

This is a real cause for concern. **It's one of the CFO's responsibilities to use good judgment and to conduct oversight - to make sure political convenience is not placed above ethics or the best interest of Floridians.
**[We recently rolled out an online ad about this very same thing ](https://act.myngp.com/el/tqwThV-W9vdBMizpa7-Tye0qKpXulQ-2cS_UImN_P9o=/BOHiU-yFeAC88bdW0-Tsm64kFVBwYd43AM21HFQi5Ts=?v=1LHzoxU3OHc&feature=youtu.be)**\-- highlighting how our current CFO has redefined the role,**in the worst possible way, by misusing taxpayer resources - using _your_ hard-earned money for his own crass political purposes, including condoning questionable donors, like Lindberg.** This is exactly the kind of thing that got me to throw my hat into the "ring" for this race. It's time for us to redefine the role of CFO once again - but this time, to make sure they are working for _you_ and your interests, not some corrupt donor from out of state. [****](https://act.myngp.com/el/tqwThV-W9vdBMizpa7-Tye0qKpXulQ-2cS_UImN_P9o=/BOHiU-yFeAC88bdW0-Tsm64kFVBwYd43AM21HFQi5Ts=?v=1LHzoxU3OHc&feature=youtu.be) [Help JR get to the Cabinet. | | | Fellow American, I'm sure you've seen it in the national news, but I'd like to reiterate: There is serious hostility towards the founding principles of liberty on college campuses. Many college students are not taught the true meaning of terms like "Freedom" and "Equality." They are accepting false promises of free college and health care and voting for candidates who wish to embrace that fantasy. This is evidenced by the voting records of millennials in the last election, where **many more voted for Bernie Sanders in the primaries than both Clinton and Trump combined.** Worst of all, students on college campuses refuse to engage with those with whom they disagree. Instead, many resort to intimidation, threats, and rioting in a manner that incites violence. I'm curious to know what you think about the state of higher education in America. If you have a few minutes, I'd love to ask you a few questions about the state of America's education system, and whether the damage to it can be repaired. Take the survey now >> [**https://www.research.net/r/hillsdale_higher_education_survey**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzAzLTk1MWI2ZTdhYmE2ZDQ4N2I5YzIwOTE5YjE5MDFjMmZj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVzZWFyY2gubmV0L3IvaGlsbHNkYWxlX2hpZ2hlcl9lZHVjYXRpb25fc3VydmV5P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9HT1BQcmVzMzEwMzAxOCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249aGlnaGVyZWR1Y2F0aW9uc3VydmV5JmFwcGVhbF9jb2RlPU1LODE3RU0z&K=xkVfmepI0ZuoMmIko6JSmA) | [**Take the Survey**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzAzLTk1MWI2ZTdhYmE2ZDQ4N2I5YzIwOTE5YjE5MDFjMmZj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVzZWFyY2gubmV0L3IvaGlsbHNkYWxlX2hpZ2hlcl9lZHVjYXRpb25fc3VydmV5P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9HT1BQcmVzMzEwMzAxOCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249aGlnaGVyZWR1Y2F0aW9uc3VydmV5JmFwcGVhbF9jb2RlPU1LODE3RU0z&K=ZeLkds_DiuAkoQ79-38x5A)

name: Bob Corney, Bredesen 2018
subject: 3 quick updates
body:
|
#
Peter -- With Early Voting coming to an end later this week here in Tennessee, I wanted to give you a quick update on where things stand:
1. **The turnout for early voting in this midterm election is at historic levels.** We’ve dwarfed early turnout from 2014, and even 2010, nearing presidential levels.

2. **This race is CLOSE.** Election watchers and journalists all agree that Phil Bredesen is in a deadlock with Congresswoman Blackburn and that this race could still go either way.

3. **We still need to turn out more voters.** If we’re going to win this thing, we’ve still got to get tens of thousands more Tennesseans to the polls.

The fact is that this race is a dead heat even after more than $20 million in negative attacks is a testament to the grassroots operation we’ve been able to build together. But in the closing days of this campaign, the attacks are going to get worse. We can’t take anything for granted -- we have to keep pushing to get every voter we can to the polls. **That’s why I’ve got to ask: can we count on your help right now? clean_body: | Peter -- With Early Voting coming to an end later this week here in Tennessee, I wanted to give you a quick update on where things stand: 1. The turnout for early voting in this midterm election is at historic levels. We’ve dwarfed early turnout from 2014, and even 2010, nearing presidential levels. 2. This race is CLOSE. Election watchers and journalists all agree that Phil Bredesen is in a deadlock with Congresswoman Blackburn and that this race could still go either way. 3. We still need to turn out more voters. If we’re going to win this thing, we’ve still got to get tens of thousands more Tennesseans to the polls. The fact is that this race is a dead heat even after more than $20 million in negative attacks is a testament to the grassroots operation we’ve been able to build together. But in the closing days of this campaign, the attacks are going to get worse. We can’t take anything for granted -- we have to keep pushing to get every voter we can to the polls. That’s why I’ve got to ask: can we count on your help right now? Add a donation of $10 or whatever you can right now to help us shake off these attacks and get voters to the polls. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ****=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** Thanks for letting us count on you, Bob Corney Campaign Manager Bredesen for Senate Paid for by Bredesen Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Bredesen for Senate and the Tennessee Democratic Party Bredesen Victory Fund P.O. Box 92010 Nashville, TN 37209 United States

body:
Hi friend,
Did you see Kate's email yesterday? Tomorrow's deadline is critical, and if you've been waiting for the right moment to make your money count -- the time is now.
**[Click here to send a donation in before tomorrow's deadline!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a031/5e076a9e/54d2232b/1442572e/2235128104/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raimondo?refcode=181030")**
Many thanks,
Gina
Sent from my iPhone
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Kate Ramstad (kr@ginaraimondo.com)
Date: 10/29/18, 1:20pm
Subject: Almost here
Hi friend,
**Our LAST END OF MONTH DEADLINE is at MIDNIGHT on Halloween.** We've set one last end of month goal: **We need to raise another $20,000 before then** to help Gina win this election. **[Can you help?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a031/5e076a9e/54d2232b/1442572e/2235128104/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raimondo?refcode=181030")**
A win for Gina means:
* Creating jobs for Rhode Islanders
* Protecting Rhode Islanders' access to affordable healthcare
* Preparing Rhode Islanders for the jobs of the 21st century
* Rebuilding roads, bridges, and schools
* Protecting Rhode Island's environment
* Supporting our students and teachers
* Standing up for gun safety
* Fighting the Trump agenda

A win for Gina is a win for Rhode Islanders. **[Click here to donate $35 to Gina's campaign or as much as you can right now!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a031/5e076a9e/54d2232b/1442572e/2235128104/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raimondo?refcode=181030")**
Thanks for your support.
Kate
Kate Ramstad
Finance Director

name: Adam Spanberger
subject: we have 7 days to flip VA-7
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
There are 7 days to go until Election Day -- so we have exactly 7 days to flip VA-7. Let's show Abby that we are proud of all she has accomplished, and that we will stand with her for the next 7 days.
| | Peter, You've heard the story by now. About a year and a half ago, Abby decided to step up and run for Congress. We launched this campaign from our kitchen table. We told our daughters about Abby's career serving this country in the CIA. We warned them that she might become the subject of criticism and negative television ads, but that it would be a sign that the campaign was successful. In the year-plus since, I've been consistently amazed by Abby's drive to make a difference for this community. She has inspired an incredible grassroots movement and pushed this race to a tie (which in turn inspired Republican Super PACs to attack her on TV). **Now, there are 7 days to go until Election Day --_so we have exactly 7 days to flip VA-7._** Can you help me show Abby that we are proud of all she has accomplished, and that we will stand with her for the next 7 days, [**by making today the campaign 's biggest day of grassroots fundraising yet?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/rtvp3kH1sqV3QLMxOdSc0r8efLag3T943nMZsOKdL7I=/Ei19DjxkkklBijDRkJVYh-E4h2hGUFAofuTyqyBfJ3Q=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.30_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [**To do so, chip in $7 to flip VA-7, Peter.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/rtvp3kH1sqV3QLMxOdSc0r8efLag3T943nMZsOKdL7I=/Ei19DjxkkklBijDRkJVYh-E4h2hGUFAofuTyqyBfJ3Q=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.30_b1_as_all&amount=7&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) This race is close, and we'll only win in 7 days if we stand together. Thanks, Adam [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rtvp3kH1sqV3QLMxOdSc0r8efLag3T943nMZsOKdL7I=/Ei19DjxkkklBijDRkJVYh-E4h2hGUFAofuTyqyBfJ3Q=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.30_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rtvp3kH1sqV3QLMxOdSc0r8efLag3T943nMZsOKdL7I=/Ei19DjxkkklBijDRkJVYh-E4h2hGUFAofuTyqyBfJ3Q=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/rtvp3kH1sqV3QLMxOdSc0r8efLag3T943nMZsOKdL7I=/TEq6FfUMQWHNNznjVJyaaMffioCKDqPs3JEqfCM4Bq4=)_

_Are you ready?_

In just ONE week, Hoosiers across the state will make their voices heard on Election Day.

**Make sure you bring your government-issued photo ID before voting in what will be a critical Election on Tuesday, November 6.**

**Polls are open 6:00 AM to 6:00 PM on Tuesday, November 6.**

**[Click here to find your polling location>>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=807973ef84734205bd4d52eae0250073&_e=fAtynntUnLVtAPAEy7yLCNA4kKbmMFUPLtXI5PMo6sy59DywgBijt9KfdQCtxKqxrLs2PGCB70ThyAA48ISV98EQAJhOicv7cUG7kfyb_6pBTXx7OLI2zfDwsDxWEjEZF7AA5aVWf334CdQjwqFqNpWkpC46ndzZNYzdlP9mRDMZ7F2JmZX-tIi1tssrJ-NRcQ9f-VlpID4sQ-icX_-KMyEEVtupmYAUP0SSyR1B0IdhjbAwsKLdaaufTQ-QUBVpjD_Frh1nKGHVJO7iWoUSihYh787NkmoJneom-DBMucEO6H87UJzRhb8c0x3gFL2mK-MpxkmxTPmmznaTRvPsLrCkkLLu_KBhI5XkhuR663w%3D)**

name: Jason Yates
subject: Find out NOW how candidates will vote for you LATER
body:
Peter,
One week from today, America will decide: Will we be a nation true to the Constitution or will we be pushed into the changing tides of political ideology?
**But select capable men from all the people--men who fear God, trustworthy men who hate dishonest gain--and appoint them as officials over thousands, hundreds, fifties and tens. (Exodus 18:21)**
Not all of our representatives will be people of faith but what matters is that our Christian values will continue to be protected by the Constitution.
**[Find out NOW how candidates will vote for you LATER on](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOFdOynxE8cbGwQUVFKzgkr9BR8LZTTvf5FtfuRQg366Sg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181030com01&n=1):**
* Supreme Court Nominees
* Abortion
* End-of-life care
* Freedom of speech and religion
* Parental rights

Many of our international neighbors are still fighting for the right to vote freely. As people of faith, our responsibility to God and this country is to stand strong for our Christian values.
One of the best ways to do so...VOTE!
Locate your **[polling place](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOFdOynxE8cbGwQUVFKzgkr96Z_ZGNiSdPCkfLED6e4VgQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181030com01&n=2)** and **[view your ballot](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOFdOynxE8cbGwQUVFKzgkr9I4OoblxVR85-k6RnN-vPAQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181030com01&n=3)** \- make sure you are ready to cast your vote!
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181030com01&n=4)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: It’s only 1 week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
|
---
| | | | | | |

Friend,

You were one of the critical Americans who helped change the course of American history when my father was voted into office November 2016.

But now, all the success we've had in the last two years is on the line with these midterm elections.

With just ONE WEEK until election day, I need to know you're prepared to vote next Tuesday. Do you know your voting location? [FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=daff41bec209859c079a237782090dcb20a65bf6491e88443d613886c65be6a54daf7e4f440e8ad74290b8826a6873e8cf7ffdc4d1f41a8b)
Your vote could very well mean the difference between success and defeat at the polls this year.

If you need any information on how to vote, please visit this link: **[vote.donaldjtrump.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=daff41bec209859c4717365746876f5c207bf1bc0cb67a3edc5462b896df7810124db72dc14971697d01f9cf89b8343e6cd6ac9d945ef776)**

Friend, don't forget: VOTE TUESDAY NOVEMBER 6th.

Don't miss your chance to help President Trump and continue making America great.

Thank you,

Donald Trump, Jr. [FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=daff41bec209859ca56e17bd3441e754107d0ba874f7fc518b42fab73c924a5ad32ee0823b3bfa739803cb45dd0b4764128712c2a6d1520e)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Friend, You were one of the critical Americans who helped change the course of American history when my father was voted into office November 2016. But now, all the success we've had in the last two years is on the line with these midterm elections. With just ONE WEEK until election day, I need to know you're prepared to vote next Tuesday. Do you know your voting location? Your vote could very well mean the difference between success and defeat at the polls this year. If you need any information on how to vote, please visit this link: Friend, don't forget: VOTE TUESDAY NOVEMBER 6th. Don't miss your chance to help President Trump and continue making America great. name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: worried about this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
I'm pretty worried about Senator Claire McCaskill's re-election, everyone. Recent polls show that if the election were held today, she'd lose by one point.
It's no surprise -- **GOP corporate special interests have spent $45 million to defeat Claire, and they 've made this a really tough race.**
But Claire isn't depending on the likes of McConnell, Trump, and the Kochs to bankroll her campaign -- she's relying on you.
With only one week to go until the election, Claire really needs you. [**Will you please rush $3 or more to her campaign right now?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1c6/2a380d31/37fbff9b/f1648e/3539284761/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0Y21jIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODEwMzBfMTAyMi1NV0g0Q01DMS1SU182bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4cmc?refcode=e20181030_1022-MWH4CMC1-RS_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
If Claire's opponent, Republican Josh Hawley, wins, the GOP will pick up a rubberstamp for Trump's agenda. He's even quoted as saying that he disagrees with Trump on "nothing that has happened so far." Nothing at all.
The GOP is throwing the kitchen sink at Missouri because they know that whichever party wins here will likely win control of the Senate. The truth is, they're probably right. That's why it's so important that we stand with Claire.
You helped me win by just 1,017 votes in 2016, and now I need you to please show Claire that same support. Here's the best link to give to her campaign:
[**https://hassan.bsd.net/Protect-Claire-McCaskill**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1c6/2a380d31/37fbff9b/f1648e/3539284761/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0Y21jIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODEwMzBfMTAyMi1NV0g0Q01DMS1SU182bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4cmc?refcode=e20181030_1022-MWH4CMC1-RS_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

clean_body: Please see a special message from our sponsor. **\- From the Desk of Marsha Blackburn – Dear Fellow Conservative, With ONE WEEK until Election Day, we're facing the most important—and LAST—fundraising deadline of our campaign, and things aren't looking good. We could just throw in the towel and quit on one of the most ambitious grassroots fundraising goals across any race this cycle... But that's not the spirit of our campaign or what our fight represents. We have a considerable deficit to make up... We're short $186,784 and need to catch up to the Democrats... I’ve authorized 500% EMERGENCY MATCHING to make sure we hit our goal before our deadline. I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important, Fellow Conservative. Now that we're 7 days out, President Trump is asking for a full report of how our campaign is doing. Like I said, we’ve routinely set (and broken) the most ambitious fundraising goals, but only because I know that we have the best grassroots team in the nation! Fellow Conservative, the latest fundraising reports reveal that my opponent is so desperate to win that he's putting millions of his own money into his campaign after promising Tennesseans he wouldn't self-finance. It's no secret he's trying to buy Tennessee's Senate seat . This is in addition to the millions more that the progressive Left and coastal elites, led by Senate Democrat ringleader Chuck Schumer and anti-gun billionaire Michael Bloomberg, have been dropping. They're using their mega-donor war chest dollars to prop up my radical opponent through deceitful digital and TV ads... The only way we're going to catch up to the liberals is by activating the grassroots, Fellow Conservative, starting with YOU. Remember, this is the LAST fundraising deadline before Election Day. We have just 7 days left and it’s all coming down to this last sprint, so I’m counting on you. Thank you, Marsha Blackburn | Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. ---
Derek, the amount of absentee ballots requested and turned in before the deadline isn't just crucial for winning back Tim Kaine's Senate seat - for some House candidates it may be enough votes to completely change their race.

**In fact - we aren 't the only ones who have caught on to this:**
[In Virginia, Pence stumps for 3 GOP Congressional candidates _- NBC news_](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f109e/3e0906/74440031/3e370352/3712117491/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181030_1_FR_TEAM_pence-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+In+Virginia+Pence+stumps+for+3+GOP+Congr&utm_campaign=20181030_1_FR_TEAM_pence-LDND&source=20181030_1_FR_TEAM_pence-LDND")
---
We're in one of the most critical periods in a campaign, and Pence is spending that time _here, in Virginia._

**Here 's why:** Experts have been saying that the fight to win back the House could come down to any _one competitive House race._ [Tim truly believes that the House races in Virginia could be these deciding races, which is why the Virginia Coordinated Campaign is spending today chasing absentee ballots all over the Commonwealth.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f109e/3e0906/74440031/3e370351/3712117491/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181030_1_FR_TEAM_pence-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Tim+truly+believes+that+the+House+races+&utm_campaign=20181030_1_FR_TEAM_pence-LDND&source=20181030_1_FR_TEAM_pence-LDND")

**We need your help: Will you help power the next 24 hours of calls and texts to absentee voters AND make sure we hit our fundraising goal tomorrow at midnight so we still have resources for our "Get Out the Vote" efforts?**

There's nothing we can do that's more important than getting votes in the door in every district of Virginia. This helps elect amazing House candidates and get Tim the votes he needs to keep Corey Stewart at bay.

During the absentee voting period, we have the unique opportunity to talk to voters AS they are voting. So thank you for helping fund this work - it's directly translating into votes as we speak.

**And clearly it 's working because Pence is scared enough to spend one of the most critical weeks of the cycle right here in Virginia. body:

| | Friends,
It's hard to believe it, but Election Day is ONE WEEK away on Tuesday, November 6th.
The deadline to apply for an absentee ballot is this Thursday, November 1st. You can find more information [here](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=132A152A9A3905). If you're not sure where your polling place is located, find it [here](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=132A152A9A3906).
Remember to get out and vote next Tuesday, and remind your friends and family to do the same. This is a critically important cycle for Republicans across the country, and it is imperative that we maintain our conservative majorities in the House and Senate to continue delivering meaningful results for the American people.
I humbly ask for your support at the polls on November 6th. It is an honor to serve you in Congress.
\- Martha

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Not one of those ���Crazy Democrats?���
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE
body:
I’m not quite sure what exactly defines a “crazy Democrat” but I can’t imagine McCaskill is too far off. In what might be the most bizarre statement by Senator McCaskill yet, her campaign recently made an ad admitting that Missourians don't have to like her to vote for her. And another ad insists, she’s not one of those “crazy Democrats.”

_**What?**_

I’m not quite sure what exactly defines a “crazy Democrat” but I can’t imagine Senator McCaskill is too far off. **Voting to raise taxes, accepting support from radical pro-abortion groups, and taking family vacations with Chuck Schumer all seem right on par with what a “crazy Democrat" would do.**

That is why Chuck Schumer and the “crazy Democrats” in DC are spending millions of dollars to try to save her reliably liberal vote in the US Senate. And, it is why President Trump is coming to Missouri to help us close this election.

clean_body: I’m not quite sure what exactly defines a “crazy Democrat” but I can’t imagine McCaskill is too far off. In what might be the most bizarre statement by Senator McCaskill yet, her campaign recently made an ad admitting that Missourians don't have to like her to vote for her. And another ad insists, she’s not one of those “crazy Democrats.” What? I’m not quite sure what exactly defines a “crazy Democrat” but I can’t imagine Senator McCaskill is too far off. Voting to raise taxes, accepting support from radical pro-abortion groups, and taking family vacations with Chuck Schumer all seem right on par with what a “crazy Democrat" would do. That is why Chuck Schumer and the “crazy Democrats” in DC are spending millions of dollars to try to save her reliably liberal vote in the US Senate. And, it is why President Trump is coming to Missouri to help us close this election. Thank you for always standing with us. For Missouri, Josh Hawley | "Facebook" "Twitter" "Google+" PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I am writing to ask you to make a $3 donation to Andrew Gillum’s campaign before he has to stop fundraising tomorrow and for the rest of the election. This is important. Let me share why.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
Out of all the races, this is one to watch.
#

Sisters and Brothers -
The governor’s race in Florida is not only one of the most important campaigns in the country. It is one of the closest as well. Here is the most recent poll, just published on Sunday:
**Florida Governor Poll - October 28**
Andrew Gillum (D): 47%
Ron DeSantis (R): 46%
Tomorrow morning, I am going to head to Florida to rally progressives in that state to help push Andrew Gillum over the top. Because the truth is, his victory would not only instantly make him one of the most progressive governors in the country, it would send an unmistakable message about the ideas we must run on if we want to beat Trump and Trumpism in 2020.
So when I get to Florida, I want to let Andrew Gillum know the political revolution is with him. Today and tomorrow are the last days he is allowed to fundraise for the rest of the campaign. Then he has to stop. So he needs our help to finish strong:
**[Can you split a $3 donation between Andrew Gillum’s campaign for governor before tomorrow’s deadline and my work rallying progressives across the country in this final week before the election? This is very important.](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/1404?refcode=em181030-full&t=25&akid=298%2E150750%2EB4fUYC)**
We endorsed Andrew’s campaign in the final weeks of his primary when very few people thought he had a chance to win. But it turns out that, when you have the people on your side, anything is possible.
We can be the difference for Andrew once again this week — the ones who help push him over the top to become Florida’s next governor. That’s why your donation is so important.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[DONATE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/1404?refcode=em181030-full&t=50&akid=298%2E150750%2EB4fUYC)
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, [click here to unsubscribe](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=51&akid=298%2E150750%2EB4fUYC). To support Bernie with a contribution, [click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=52&akid=298%2E150750%2EB4fUYC).

We must [**reach our $218,000 goal in the next 36 hours.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c94/622b7b5b/1dbdc83e/307b6624/2845603654/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181030?refcode=dwse181030_m&recurring=true&amount=5") We must complete our GOTV plan. name: Mandi Karp, Steve Sisolak for Governor
subject: Tough love
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/CPyK70bH23dUuQzCWeIpOkMZXSvtAtvFvk1o_3i4TN4=/SxTUl_t2svubDgQyufst1Yem53PSBlwfBgTWXTfcMWA=?gpsid=37_57_4815&refcode=em18_181030_538kck_LG_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181030_538kck_LG_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
---
Hello --

Last week, we learned that the experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ are predicting the race for governor in our state will be the closest one in the country.

Over the last week, we've been working our tails off, but I have bad news. The forecast has hardly changed. If anything, it's shifted ever so slightly in Laxalt's favor.

I hate to say this because I know you've been in Steve's corner, but sometimes, the truth is hard: if supporters like you don't step up soon I don't know how Steve wins. **[Chip in $5 or more right now so it doesn't come to that:](https://act.myngp.com/el/CPyK70bH23dUuQzCWeIpOkMZXSvtAtvFvk1o_3i4TN4=/SxTUl_t2svubDgQyufst1Yem53PSBlwfBgTWXTfcMWA=?gpsid=37_57_4815&refcode=em18_181030_538kck_L1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181030_538kck_L1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/CPyK70bH23dUuQzCWeIpOkMZXSvtAtvFvk1o_3i4TN4=/SxTUl_t2svubDgQyufst1Yem53PSBlwfBgTWXTfcMWA=?gpsid=37_57_4815&refcode=em18_181030_538kck_B1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181030_538kck_B1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
---
I know you don't want to wake up on November 7th thinking you could have done more.

Thanks for digging deep,

Mandi Karp
Finance Director
Steve Sisolak for Governor

body:
President Obama is coming to Georgia! |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa755/34a064cc/a6e806/70ca627/1466185972/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | BIG NEWS - _President Obama is coming to Georgia!_ Yes, you read that right. This Friday, November 2nd, President Obama is coming here to Atlanta to rally voters in support of Stacey Abrams and Georgia Democrats -- and we want you there with us! **What:** Get Out the Vote Rally with President Obama, Stacey Abrams, and Democratic Candidates Across Georgia
**Where:** Forbes Arena at Morehouse College
Atlanta, GA 30314
**When:** Friday, November 2
**Doors open:** 5:00 PM On **Wednesday, October 31** you can pick up up to two free tickets (first come, first served) from **2:00 pm to 5:00 pm** at locations all across the state. Learn more: **[TICKETS](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa755/34a064cc/a6e806/70ca624/1466185972/VEsE/ "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/obama/")** With only days left until voters cast their final ballots, this is our chance to make our choice to change our Georgia, and President Obama is coming down to help us get fired up for another potentially historic moment. We're in the home stretch, friend, but we can do this -- we can turn Georgia Blue. Join Stacey Abrams, Georgia Democrats, and President Obama on Friday November 2, and then let's go get it done. See you there, Team Abrams

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: How we truly defeat Trumpism, right now.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
We can defeat Trumpism with elections like this one.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3796ec/7ab0e2c4/7e677655/3499be35/1141233642/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-final-deadline?refcode=OHQ10308A") Friend, It is more important than ever that we elect great governors all across this country -- that's why I'm back in Maryland tonight with my friend Ben Jealous. In this election, it is our job not only to defeat Trumpism, but to do it by supporting candidates who offer a progressive vision and hope for where this country can go. That can start right here in Maryland, with the progressive agenda Ben has for this state. Like me, Ben doesn't rely on millionaires and billionaires for money -- but his opponent does. Ben's campaign is built on a grassroots foundation, but we are one week away from Election Day. So, if he is going to see this through, it's going to take people like you helping him across the finish line. [**Tomorrow night marks this campaign's FINAL deadline before Election Day -- and we can win, if folks like you invest in this progressive movement. Can you donate $5 or more to help him raise $75,000 before tomorrow?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3796ec/7ab0e2c4/7e677655/3499be35/1141233642/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-final-deadline?refcode=OHQ10308A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3796ec/7ab0e2c4/7e677655/3499be34/1141233642/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-final-deadline?refcode=OHQ10308A&amount=5&express_lane=true")
---

---
| [**$50 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3796ec/7ab0e2c4/7e677655/3499be36/1141233642/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-final-deadline?refcode=OHQ10308A&amount=50&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**$100 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3796ec/7ab0e2c4/7e677655/3499be31/1141233642/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-final-deadline?refcode=OHQ10308A&amount=100&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$250 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3796ec/7ab0e2c4/7e677655/3499be30/1141233642/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-final-deadline?refcode=OHQ10308A&amount=250&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3796ec/7ab0e2c4/7e677655/3499be33/1141233642/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-final-deadline?refcode=OHQ10308A&express_lane=true")
---
In his campaign, Ben Jealous is talking about health care as a right for every man, woman, and child. He is talking about our broken criminal justice system and the absurdity that so many of our young people are unable to afford higher education.
He is addressing the global crisis of climate change and the need for real, comprehensive immigration reform. He is talking about the belief that a woman should be making the decisions about what happens to her own body. All of this, while his Republican opponent is not standing up to Donald Trump or for the people of Maryland -- Governor Larry Hogan is hoping he can win by doing next to nothing, and convincing voters that anything more is simply "too risky."
But that's not what the people of Maryland deserve. I spent a lot of time on the campaign trail with Ben in 2016, and I know he has big plans and big ideas -- ones that can make Maryland a leader again. Like me, he doesn't run to the left or to the right, because he's running to the people. And right now, he needs our help to win next week.
[**Ben is a great progressive. He was there for our campaign when few were. He can win if you're with him. Donate before his FINAL deadline tomorrow -- donate $5 or more today to help him raise $75,000 before this final deadline to fight back against a corporate-funded Republican opponent.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3796ec/7ab0e2c4/7e677655/3499be35/1141233642/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-final-deadline?refcode=OHQ10308A")
One of the ways we can most effectively oppose Donald Trump's right-wing extremism is with strong progressive leadership at the state and local level. And there are few progressives stronger than Ben Jealous. Let's help get him elected.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3796ec/7ab0e2c4/7e677655/3499be35/1141233642/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-final-deadline?refcode=OHQ10308A")
---

name: Brandon Davis, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: The last push
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3613/9e00690/574c3630/2400e36e/271823450/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181028_FinFR2_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&source=em18_181028_FinFR2_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx")
Friends,

Floridians are fired up and more ready than ever to flip our state blue and elect Mayor Gillum as Governor -- but we need your help to keep going for the last push.

The final reporting deadline for the State of Florida is Thursday, November 1 at midnight -- so everything we raise now will go towards our final get-out-the-vote effort before Election Day. **[Will you pitch in $5 or more now to make sure we're prepared?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3613/9e00690/574c3630/2400e361/271823450/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-final-fr-deadline?gpsid=13_55_4734&refcode=em18_181030_FinFR3_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181030_FinFR3_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+pitch+in++ask++or+more+now+to+m")**

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3613/9e00690/574c3630/2400e360/271823450/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-final-fr-deadline?gpsid=13_55_4734&refcode=em18_181030_FinFR3_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181030_FinFR3_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3")
We need a leader who will put everyday Floridians first and take back the Governor's office after over two decades of Republican and special interest control. But this race couldn't be closer -- and by now, it's clear what's at stake.

Affordable healthcare, properly-funded public education, and our environment are on the line, and, believe it or not, the entire country will be watching November 6 to see if we flip Florida.

**[We're not safe until the results come in on election night. So please, chip in $5 or more now and help us finish our last deadline on top.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3613/9e00690/574c3630/2400e363/271823450/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-final-fr-deadline?gpsid=13_55_4734&refcode=em18_181030_FinFR3_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181030_FinFR3_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=4+-+Were+not+safe+until+the+results+come+in+")**

Bring it home,

Brandon Davis
Campaign Manager
Andrew Gillum for Governor

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3613/9e00690/574c3630/2400e362/271823450/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-final-fr-deadline?gpsid=13_55_4734&refcode=em18_181030_FinFR3_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181030_FinFR3_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=5+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

subject: President Trump to Visit Pittsburgh After Synagogue Massacre
body:
| |
---
# _President Trump to Visit Pittsburgh After Synagogue Massacre_
“President Trump will visit Pittsburgh on Tuesday to console victims of the synagogue massacre and their families,” S.A. Miller reports for _The Washington Times_. “White House press secretary Sarah Huckabee Sanders said the president, who will be accompanied by first lady Melania Trump in Pittsburgh, is working to comfort a country heartbroken by the horrific attack and unify Americans to confront anti-Semitism everywhere.” “Anti-Semitism is a plague to humanity,” Sanders said from the White House yesterday. **[Click here to continue reading.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDMwLjk2OTI5ODcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAzMC45NjkyOTg3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4NzA0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/oct/29/trump-visit-pittsburgh-after-synagogue-massacre/)** “The so-called migrant caravan that's slowly making its way to the U.S. from Central America is many things to many people. But one thing seems pretty certain: it's not about seeking ‘asylum,’ or ‘refugee status.’ It's about getting to the United States at all costs,” the[ _**Investor’s Business Daily**_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDMwLjk2OTI5ODcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAzMC45NjkyOTg3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4NzA0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.investors.com/politics/editorials/migrant-caravan-u-s-sovereignty/) editorial board writes. “It's time we take our border seriously, or we'll end up like those countries in Europe and the Mideast who find their nations no longer governable.” “The Tax Cuts and Jobs Act has been one of the strongest and boldest reforms of President Donald Trump’s first term in office. According to analysis from The Heritage Foundation, the tax law will give hardworking Americans tax breaks in every congressional district and in every state,” Kevin Dayaratna writes in [_**The Daily Signal.**_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDMwLjk2OTI5ODcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAzMC45NjkyOTg3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4NzA0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.dailysignal.com/2018/10/29/heres-how-the-tax-cuts-are-helping-americans-in-every-state/) See what the average tax cut is in your district **[here.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDMwLjk2OTI5ODcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAzMC45NjkyOTg3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4NzA0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.taxesandjobs.com/)** “In 2016, President Barack Obama said then-candidate Donald Trump would need a magic wand to deliver on his promise to bring back manufacturing. Turns out, Trump didn’t need a magic wand — all he needed was tax reform,” Abigail Marone writes in the _**[Washington Examiner.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDMwLjk2OTI5ODcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAzMC45NjkyOTg3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4NzA0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/trumps-tax-cuts-jolt-manufacturing-jobs) **_“Since President Trump signed the tax cuts, manufacturing has been booming. At least 100 manufacturers have built new facilities, purchased new equipment, hired new employees, and invested in current employees through bonuses and benefit increases.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDMwLjk2OTI5ODcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAzMC45NjkyOTg3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4NzA0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDMwLjk2OTI5ODcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAzMC45NjkyOTg3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4NzA0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDMwLjk2OTI5ODcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAzMC45NjkyOTg3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE2OTk4NzA0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mbXZpZD0mZXh0cmE9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Tina
subject: Please rush an urgent contribution before our deadline tomorrow at midnight so we can win this race and help Democrats take back the Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I have something to ask you, friend.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181030AM_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") In a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for Senate. But before I do that, I'd like to explain to you why this request is so important, especially this week. Tomorrow is the final end-of-month deadline of the campaign and will leave us just 6 days from Election Day. After Wednesday, we will be setting our final budgets for get out the vote and we will know how strong a program we can run. We've set our largest monthly goal yet of this campaign by midnight tomorrow, and if we come up short -- even by a few dollars -- we'll need to cut back on our voter turnout program. That means fewer supplies ordered, cutting back on our response to super PAC attacks, and fewer voters reached. This is all key to our plan to win, but we can't implement it if our grassroots team falls short. And friend, we have to win this race -- we just can't allow Mitch McConnell to rubber stamp Trump's extreme agenda another two years. He has tried to take away health care from millions of people. He has left our infrastructure and programs people rely on behind. And in the meantime, he's given tax break after tax break to the same corporate interests and wealthy donors who are now funding the Republican attacks against Democrats like me across the country. Those corporate interests and right-wing mega-donors are ready to throw endless amounts of money behind my opponent -- and we need your help to reach our grassroots goal so that we're ready to fight back. **[Your contribution could be the difference between victory or defeat in this race. Every single dollar helps us grow this team even bigger and show Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and all our opponent's wealthy backers that we won't back down no matter what. Please rush an urgent contribution before our deadline tomorrow at midnight so we can win this race and help Democrats take back the Senate. ](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181030AM_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** **[Chip in Now](https://action.tinaforminnesota. That 's why Senate Republicans and Donald Trump have made her one of their top targets. She needs your help if she is going to win this tough race. ** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181030AM_em-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

body:
|

| |

---|---
| Friend,
---
| With the **election just one week away** , we’re gearing up for **Governor Scott’s famous 14 County Tour on Monday, November 5! Joined by our next Lt. Governor Don Turner** and his team, we’ll be on the road Monday, stopping into each county in Vermont! We will end the day at Georgia Mountain Maples for one final rally before Election Day. **All are welcome, and we encourage you to invite your friends and family to join us along the way! **

If you can attend any or all of the stops please, let us know by **[clicking here](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=67d8a538c1&e=19cebfe173)**. For questions or more information, please contact Hazel Brewster by email at [hazel@philscott.org](mailto:hazel@philscott.org).

Thank you all for your continued support! We look forward to seeing you!
**14 County Tour Schedule ** **Berlin:** Maplewood Convenience Store; 4:30-5:00 am
**Morrisville:** Across from Hannaford’s shopping plaza; 5:25 – 5:55am
**Orleans:** Barton Park and Ride at Rt.5 and Rt.58; 6:25 – 6:55am
**Island Pond:** Legion parking lot, 7:10 – 7:40am
**St. Johnsbury:** St. Jay Auto; 8:10 – 8:40am
**Bradford:** Intersection of Rt.5 and Rt.25b; 8:55 – 9:25am
**White River Junction:** The Station (bus terminal); 9:45 – 10:10am
**Springfield:** Nortrax Equipment; 10:30 – 11:00am
**Brattleboro:** O’Reilly Auto Parts; 11:25 – 11:55am
**Bennington:** Vermont Veterans Deer Park; 12:45 – 1:15pm
**Rutland:** AT&T, Route 7 South; 2:00 – 2:30pm
**Middlebury:** Foster Motors; 3:00 – 3:30pm
**South Burlington:** Goss Dodge; 4:00 – 4:30pm
**South Hero:** Apple Island General Store; 5:00 – 5:30pm
**St. Albans:** Taylor Park; 5:45 – 6:15pm

**Celebration and Rally at Georgia Mountain Maples, 345 North Road, Milton; 6:30pm**
---
| | | | | | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=9c25d5df5f&e=19cebfe173)
---

subject: President Donald Trump Returns to Indiana!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
RSVP now to attend a Make America Great Again Rally in Southport or Fort Wayne! President Donald Trump is coming to Indiana, and you won't want to... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/president-donald-trump-returns-to-indiana?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| **_#RealNews Alert:_
President Donald Trump Returns to Indiana!**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cae55699c5&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **RSVP for Southport & Fort Wayne Rallies!**
---
| HUGE news, Hoosiers! President Donald Trump just announced that he is returning to Indiana not once -- but _TWICE_ \-- before Election Day, and you'll definitely want to be there!

**President Trump and Vice President Mike Pence will be taking the national stage in Southport on Friday evening, and President Trump will be in Fort Wayne on Monday evening for Make America Great Again rallies!**
[>> RSVP for Southport Rally >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9f722ff25a&e=1acd9bb3d6)

[>>RSVP for Fort Wayne Rally >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=47bc82c773&e=1acd9bb3d6)
These history-making rallies will be all about Mike Braun -- our conservative outsider and businessman (sound familiar?) -- who is running for U.S. Senate. President Trump needs Mike Braun as a key ally in the Senate to help him drain the swamp and continue the progress we're seeing in Washington!

Indiana is a key battleground for control of the U.S. Senate, and President Trump knows that we need to win Indiana. He's already held rallies in Elkhart and Evansville this election cycle, and he needs to see you in either Southport or Fort Wayne (or both!!).

**RSVP today, and let us know that you're ready to rally with President Trump, Mike Braun and our entire Republican team as we work toward victory on Election Day!**
---
|
---
| [RSVP for Southport Rally!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=627fd1a8c0&e=1acd9bb3d6 "RSVP for Southport Rally!")

name: Madeleine Albright
subject: I am anxious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wHijiIstoJRJRzVbfv1YHcSsWLJAoszwpCq3avOXs6E=/pQOmOTz43db_LQx4onhJtY_1RsFRBD_gU8Xc7Mng06M=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20181030_MA_20181030-albright_all_logo)
**Peter, this is urgent. _[I am asking for $25 to help get Jessica Morse to Congress.](https://act.myngp.com/el/wHijiIstoJRJRzVbfv1YHcSsWLJAoszwpCq3avOXs6E=/pQOmOTz43db_LQx4onhJtY_1RsFRBD_gU8Xc7Mng06M=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20181030_MA_20181030-albright_all_l1)_**
I have been in politics for decades. I have broken glass ceilings as the first female Secretary of State and gone toe-to-toe with some of the world's toughest leaders.
It takes a lot to make me uneasy, but right now, **I am anxious.**
The midterm elections are just 7 days away and control of the House could come down to just one or two races.
**Jessica Morse 's race could decide control of Congress, so I am personally reaching out to ask you to rush urgently needed support to Jessica's campaign today.**
**You can do your part by using this link to send a donation right now:_[www.secure.actblue.com/donate/jm-ma](https://act.myngp.com/el/wHijiIstoJRJRzVbfv1YHcSsWLJAoszwpCq3avOXs6E=/pQOmOTz43db_LQx4onhJtY_1RsFRBD_gU8Xc7Mng06M=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20181030_MA_20181030-albright_all_l2)_ **
It is clear that Jessica is on a mission to restore sanity in our nation's capital. She is a champion for ensuring all Americans have access to accessible and affordable health care and has shown time and again that she will put the needs of California's families first. But this race is going to be a close one and Jessica needs your help in these final days.
**Can I count on you to contribute to Jessica 's campaign today? Our shared Democratic values are on the chopping block. If Democrats don't take back the House, I fear the fabric of our nation could be seriously damaged.
