body:
My campaign manager asked me to reach out to you and ask if you have been able to make a donation yet.Hello Peter,

I know we have been emailing you a lot lately, but my campaign manager asked me to reach out to you and ask if you have been able to make a donation yet.

These final days are the most critical in any campaign, especially in one like this. Senator McCaskill and Chuck Schumer know that we are pulling ahead, and they are pulling out all the stops to stop that from happening. The President is planning to come to Missouri soon to help, but all of that will count for nothing if we don't have the funds we need to fight.

Please, if you are able, make your most generous contribution today.

[https://secure.joshhawley.com/dpwillis67@gmail.com ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=db170497c9814bf5b6d5bb26faaa35f1&_e=KgXmbvFmEOZHSGxMSObQFA1sbAxFvoGYS0qr8h-I3l6YFV2f-HsZTxeZ9aBpfqvlS6dxEMdyB43o-Q14pKF5aMBNS6GZqdZ0L7Gs5NBuSryAxEYx2wOjRaKOiKwYV7EtUzGvTjlgZoqRiZk5enJGwHMDXwRoOvmAEa_zlDKh7Fzs3QQGc-WAasdfq2FVeAl7x--ZfJEcPqQQ_2qR3qK1eIDuRtUIkYtydkQoGPwP6lFlXeFQw2vFm8TBpXZvUGaiB863Yjdv_Jpo4ZyjQPo8ChXLbDxfdxK-uzKOxIVrjSQUJWE1x6e5CyaWjuWfuSAwVo9LJJy5mg8ga3azGfYO4h0u0imRTz59M_W7T_IWv7Kb1g0lNFUzdDQg43bcCS-9qRVSa_Jw9hljWDGPoajZIw%3D%3D)

Thank you for everything,

Josh Hawley

\--------Forwarded Message--------

To: Josh
Subject: Have you reached out to Peter yet?
Date: October 29, 2018

Josh,

We are finalizing the last bit of media and GOTV budget today.

Can you reach out to Peter and ask them to pitch in before the end of the month?

This is critical to winning this race - if we don't have the money before then, we can't make the final push.

Thanks

Kyle

body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7c1a/51dbcc2a/1634d123/3ac1e38/237176971/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Hey there,

We have some bad news. In the first half of October, Lou Barletta raised **_$221,066_** more than Bob. That's a huge gap, and it could make a real difference going into the final days of this campaign.

The good news is that I just heard from a handful of donors, and they're so motivated to close this gap that they're going to **match up to $30,000 in donations** between now and the end of October.

**Let's work together and close this gap, team. What can you give to help? Every dollar will be doubled.** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 (Becomes $10)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181030_fr1_nd_pa&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 (Becomes $50)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181030_fr1_nd_pa&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** We can't let this slide. There is way too much at stake on Election Day, and only seven days left in this race to make our voices heard.

Thanks,

Simone

name: Jody Casey, betofortexas.com
subject: GOOD news for Beto
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

In just a second, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to Beto
towards our final end-of-month goal. But first I hope you’ll let me spell
out the three reasons we’re so optimistic about our chances heading into
these final days:

1. Based on the kinds of voters who have already cast ballots early, this
election is extremely close. Beto can win!
2. This year already set a new record for early voting turnout. Beto has
inspired unprecedented numbers of new voters to join our movement.
We’re not just increasing turnout, we’re changing who votes. And that
makes all the difference.
3. Young people are turning out to vote at a rate 2X how many voted in
2014.

Millions more Texans still haven’t voted yet -- and it’s up to us to get
every single Beto supporter to the polls. Beto can win -- he’s counting on
us to crush our fundraising goals so we can fully fund all our ‘get out
the vote’ programs. Unfortunately, our fundraising has dipped down lately.
Can we count on you to help make up lost ground?

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181030&t=1019&akid=22701%2E444211%2EzEU-WC ]Rush a
$3
contribution right now to Beto before the time is up on our final
end-of-month goal.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181030&t=1020&akid=22701%2E444211%2EzEU-WC ]Contribute
$3
»

This election could come down to just a few thousand votes. It’ll be
extremely close. When we win on November 6, it’ll be because people like
you stepped up to contribute and fund this grassroots campaign. No PACs,
no corporations. Just people.

I’m so grateful for each of you,

Jody Casey
Campaign Manager
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181030&t=1021&akid=22701%2E444211%2EzEU-WC ]Contribute

subject: Warning: This email contains sensitive content
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1099/3e0906/74525f33/3e370454/3834738298/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND&source=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND")

| | | [**GOP senate candidate 's rally features speaker who urges turning 'blue wave into a blue grave' **_-- ThinkProgress, 10/29/18_](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1099/3e0906/74525f33/3e3704ab/3834738298/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+GOP+senate+candidatersquos+rally+feature&utm_campaign=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND&source=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND")
---
Derek, I'll give you exactly one guess at who that GOP senate candidate is. That's right -- [Corey Stewart](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1099/3e0906/74525f33/3e3704aa/3834738298/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Corey+Stewart&utm_campaign=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND&source=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND"). At a Stewart rally in Lynchburg yesterday, Jennifer Brown, the 6th Congressional District GOP chair, actually said this:
**_"We need to do everything we can to turn that 'blue wave' into a blue grave."_**
**THIS IS NOT OKAY.** These comments come just days after pipe bombs were mailed to leading Democrats. They are a clear incitement of violence -- literally urging death upon the political opposition. _I cannot overstate how dangerous and unacceptable this rhetoric is._

I condemn these comments in the strongest possible terms, and I hope you'll join me. [And what's more, I hope you'll help me show this chair -- and Corey Stewart -- that we are not running scared, we are rising UP. The best way to do that is to make absolutely sure that we achieve a blue wave by making a donation to the Democrats running in Virginia this year.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1099/3e0906/74525f33/3e3704a9/3834738298/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+And+whatrsquos+more+I+hope+yoursquoll+he&utm_campaign=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND&source=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND")

**We are facing our final end-of-month deadline tomorrow at midnight, and we still have $19,428 left to raise in the next 24 hours. Those donations go directly towards turning out Democratic voters and ushering in the mightiest of blue waves. Please, make a statement with me. Donate now:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [**$5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1099/3e0906/74525f33/3e3704a8/3834738298/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+5&utm_campaign=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND&source=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND")

| [**$100**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1099/3e0906/74525f33/3e3704ad/3834738298/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+100&utm_campaign=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND&source=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND")

---
Derek, I've been out on the trail with Tim Kaine -- and all of the 11 Democrats running for Congress here in Virginia -- for months upon months upon months, and if there is one single thing I've taken away from this experience, it's that Tim and his fellow Democrats are running a positive, unified campaign. They are not running on fear, or panic, or violence.

I'm proud to work for Tim, and to be a part of this movement. I hope you're proud to be a part of it, too. _When we see that blue wave rolling in on Election Night, one week from now, it will be because you decided to step up right now._

**Please, make a donation RIGHT NOW before our final end-of-month deadline to stand against these disgusting comments:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [**$5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1099/3e0906/74525f33/3e3704a2/3834738298/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=11+-+5&utm_campaign=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND&source=20181030_2_FR_IS_blue-grave-LDND")

In solidarity,

_Ian_

Ian Sams
Communications Director
Kaine for Virginia

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Rich Cordray
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter, **I 'll make this quick. Tomorrow is the FINAL end-of-month filing deadline for my friend Rich Cordray's campaign.** In a race as close as this one, every single penny is absolutely crucial. And with less than a week remaining until Election Day, I'm counting on every member of this grassroots team to step up and show their support. | | | [CHIP IN](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd00/4462dc26/701f65a7/201f1333/3354227430/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDMwcmMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181030rc?refcode=sbe181030rc_b_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
I've kept my eye on the Governor's race, and Peter, it's keeping me on the edge of my seat. Now, even Nate Silver is calling Rich's race a toss up.
Peter, I've seen my fair share of tough fights. In 2012, we won because my incredible grassroots team had my back every step of the way. This year, I'm confident this team's enthusiasm will carry us over the finish line again.
But with so much on the line for Ohio right now, Rich needs the same fired-up support. **Poll after poll shows Rich can win, but he can 't do it without you.** That's why I'm asking you to step up and help right now.
[**Please, rush your donation before tomorrow's deadline and help support Rich's team and mine.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd00/4462dc26/701f65a7/201f1333/3354227430/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDMwcmMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181030rc?refcode=sbe181030rc_b_other&refcode2=3268183")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be evenly split between Rich Cordray and Sherrod Brown:_

**[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd00/4462dc26/701f65a7/201f1332/3354227430/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDMwcmMiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181030rc?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe181030rc_b_26&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd00/4462dc26/701f65a7/201f1333/3354227430/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDMwcmMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181030rc?refcode=sbe181030rc_b_other&refcode2=3268183")**

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: FW: we have 7 days to flip VA-7
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
It's hard to believe that we are now one week away from the election. You have all worked so hard to support our efforts to chart a positive path forward for Central Virginia, and this race would not be a dead heat, with victory in sight, without you.
| | Peter, Wow. My team tells me that we have seen an enormous surge in [**small-dollar online contributions**](https://act.myngp.com/el/v6oB9KNPjJX0j1Xr_tBAa5Jq89h0Ron5yxkR9G-dkMw=/MFB3xGdAlfNoeeDx9dVVmv2pjooAjAcip5351pQPwfo=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.30_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) since my husband sent you the kind note below. It's hard to believe that we are now one week away from the election. You have all worked so hard to support our efforts to chart a positive path forward for Central Virginia, and this race would not be a dead heat, with victory in sight, without you. To mark this important milestone, [**consider chipping in $7 to flip VA-7 today,**](https://act.myngp.com/el/v6oB9KNPjJX0j1Xr_tBAa5Jq89h0Ron5yxkR9G-dkMw=/MFB3xGdAlfNoeeDx9dVVmv2pjooAjAcip5351pQPwfo=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.30_b2_as_all&amount=7&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) and I promise you that we will keep fighting to win this race, all the way until the polls close on November 6th. Thanks, \- Abigail \-----forwarded message----- From: Adam Spanberger Sent: Tue, Oct 30, 11:36 AM Subject: we have 7 days to flip VA-7 Friends, You've heard the story by now. But if we come up short in North Dakota, Democrats will throw away their one chance to take back the Senate. name: Roy Cooper
subject: I'm asking, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Our final deadline before Election Day is Wednesday.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203981/2fde7c66/49e23a3e/15686a4c/642531547/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaleom?refcode=20181027_btm_eom3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Friend,

When we announced the Break the Majority initiative over a year ago, we knew it wouldn't be easy. We knew it was going to take early mornings and late evenings. We knew that to pull off something as big as this, we were going to have to work hard.

Now, Election Day is just one week away, and all of our hard work over the last year is showing.

Our organization is strong -- I saw it in action over the weekend when I went canvassing in Charlotte and Apex. I saw it in Lee County when I spoke with volunteers at the local headquarters.

There's an enthusiasm around this election that I haven't seen before. After all we've done over the last year, there's only one thing left to do: get out the vote.

**And we need resources to be able to do that. That 's why I'm asking you again -- will you chip in today before our FINAL end-of-month fundraising deadline before Election Day?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Chip in $5 ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203981/2fde7c66/49e23a3e/15686a4f/642531547/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaleom?refcode=20181027_btm_eom3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
[Chip in $50 ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203981/2fde7c66/49e23a3e/15686a4e/642531547/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOck1pQjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaleom?refcode=20181027_btm_eom3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
[Chip in $100 ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203981/2fde7c66/49e23a3e/15686a41/642531547/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOck15QjlmUT09IjoiMTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaleom?refcode=20181027_btm_eom3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
[Chip in another amount ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203981/2fde7c66/49e23a3e/15686a40/642531547/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaleom?refcode=20181027_btm_eom3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop")
---

The stakes for this election couldn't be higher.

This next legislature will play a huge role in how our state moves forward. How much we pay our teachers depends on if we can Break the Majority. Expanding health care coverage could depend on how successful we are over this final week.

[**This is it, Friend. We can 't afford to fall short. Chip in before the deadline if you're in.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203981/2fde7c66/49e23a3e/15686a43/642531547/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaleom?refcode=20181027_btm_eom3")
Thanks for all you continue to do for our state,
Roy

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=2b604485f1a34e0d812868f47096e200&_e=epoqD2efibW3R6WwfbnLTAWQYs1qAhFNnSwvti1nhFvgitvtNKTqNw3nTyWG-uECPBQ_T9tGl7L8Uzu3gqaAmgAGgjTdvO-aXkoD-6WQwv8kmUCbH_fFss748vtuQMNartih1kOQQydrQ5UuSOOtKTcs9ilQrGO8OkL8622w_QpyjetB6hQ7RMJWqCGAF77s_bZvOnT2uVXxWt6Stbut6cOZc8N6eStEE_EWrbhMChkLv7ncBvkjD3g72FwtWtdsrr0MBTLqb9NQBU7zNtw0jA9wmX7kysFxZpTi9WCvmmY-5i69y5B9C1diYTb6xNX3MHAeEZdxZYir9xV8stoH8bxKWf4WJebUJLDFi5r-vwGgibn5HMQU9bpEOzWIlKgu) that you care about? name: Team O'Halleran
subject: urgent: placing our final TV buy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
We need to place our final TV buy of the campaign. This is our last chance to get our message out, and with Wendy Rogers and GOP Super PACs claiming late momentum in our race, we can't afford to fall
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633de5/1a8421e1/19b7a6aa5/4964cf23/3078955317/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Team, We're working toward an urgent deadline here at Team O'Halleran: **We need to place our final TV buy of the campaign.** _This is our last chance to get our message out, and with Wendy Rogers and GOP Super PACs claiming late momentum in our race,**we can 't afford to fall short.**_ We must meet our October fundraising goal tomorrow to place our buy, but we're running behind, so we have a request for you, team: [**Can you make a donation of any size right here, right now?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.30_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$10](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.30_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$25](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.30_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$50](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.30_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---|---|---
[$100](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.30_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$250](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.30_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=250&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [Other](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.30_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

We're confident that we can win this race in 7 days because of this grassroots team. Thanks to [**your continued support**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.30_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer="), we have been able to share Tom's independent record with voters across our district and spread the truth about Rogers's extremism.

But this race has gotten tight -- a Republican Super PAC recently released a poll claiming that Tom is tied with Rogers -- so we absolutely cannot afford to stop talking to voters on TV in the final week. We need to respond to Rogers's false attacks, or undecided voters might break her way.

Failure is not an option, team, [**so please make a donation so we can reach our goal tomorrow and place our last TV buy.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.30_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks,

Team O'Halleran

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.30_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonans. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633de5/1a8421e1/19b7a6aa5/4964cf2e/3078955317/VEsHAA/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Linda_S=C3=A1nchez?=
subject: We're exactly one week from Election Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
I need your help to make sure we're in full fighting shape for the most important stretch of campaigning. [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181030_One-Week_EM&amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Peter,

Exactly one week from today, voters across the country will choose a new Congress. I've been working hard to create a big blue wave in California that will carry Democrats to victory in several key House races -- **and I need your help to make sure we 're in full fighting shape for the final 7 days of campaigning.**

**[So to mark this last week, I'm asking you to give just $7 -- or more if you can!](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181030_One-Week_EM&amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** | | ******[DONATE $7 OR MORE](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181030_One-Week_EM&amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")******
---
Think back to two years ago. If you knew a week before Election Day 2016 what the final result would be, what would you have done differently?

I would have knocked on more doors, made more calls, and worked even harder to support Democrats up and down the ballot.

**Reaching voters in critical swing districts depends on our volunteers having reliable transportation and enough pens, clipboards, and water to hit all of their goals!** We're relying on grassroots donations of $7, $70, or even $700 to keep our efforts in full swing.

[**Click here to donate to keep us on the path to victory in 7 days >>**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181030_One-Week_EM&amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Let's do this!

Linda
**Rep. Linda S anchez proudly serves the 38th District of California. She is the fifth-highest ranking member of Leadership as the Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus and is the highest-ranking Latina in Congress. As a mother, union member, and progressive, Linda will always fight for America's working families.** **[CONTRIBUTE](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181030_One-Week_EM&amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---

You can contribute to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez by [**donating here.**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036692/4ac3d62d/69f446cc/1ce29bf6/2046056967/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ls_support?refcode=footer&amount=25.00&recurring=auto")
Contributions or gifts to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez are not tax deductible.

You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. Still support Linda but want fewer emails? **[Go here](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036692/4ac3d62d/69f446cc/1ce29bf7/2046056967/VEsB/ "https://secure.voteforlinda.com/page/signup/linda-sanchez-lite")** to sign up to receive less email from our campaign. [**Click here**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036692/4ac3d62d/69f446cc/1ce29bf4/2046056967/VEsO/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages and enter dpwillis67@gmail.com so we can unsubscribe you from our list.

Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
PO Box 59660
Norwalk, CA 90652

body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7c1f/51dbcc2a/162de8c9/3ac15fe/2915826384/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Can you believe it, team?

Election Day is right around the corner. In just one week, voters across the Commonwealth will head to the polls to in one of **the most important elections of our lifetimes**.

People across Pennsylvania will have the chance to elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight for students, workers, families, children and every Pennsylvanian. We're in the home stretch, and we can't slow down.

**Bob's opponent outraised us in the first half of October, and we can't afford to lose our fundraising edge, not when so much is at stake. name: Josh Hawley
subject: we are almost out of money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
President Trump is coming to Missouri this weekI know we have been emailing you a lot lately, but with President Trump coming to Missouri this week this is your last chance to show your support before he gets to town.

**I know he is going to ask about our budget for the last week of the campaign, and with our most recent ad buy, we are almost out of money. Please help me give him good news by making your donation NOW.**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
**HUGE NEWS! **
**A game-changing new poll released late last night by Change Research showed J.D. Scholten and Steve King in a one-point race!**
This poll makes it clear that Steve King’s incendiary and divisive statements are finally catching up with him and that more Iowans are fed up and looking for change. We have every opportunity to win this thing and defeat Steve King!
Every dollar we raise over the next week will help us to reach undecided voters in the final days before Nov. 6.
[**_Help us close the gap and take the lead with a contribution of whatever you can!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2926307/18899217/23211666?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmI3ZDllZC1hMWRjLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KVNDBTQFDEGFBKxclp6vyErgyJVhTFnzcCV45i8jN08=)

body:
Hey friends -
We still need to raise $5,000 before midnight tomorrow to stay on track to reach our critical end of month goal, and with just seven days until Election Day, missing a goal isn't an option if we're going to flip New Hampshire blue.
The Koch brothers, the Republican Governors Association and other right-wing organizations are spending big to defeat me - so I can't tell you how important your support is right now. I truly can't win without you.
Here's the link - every dollar you give before midnight tomorrow will be doubled!

body:
[1]Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181030&t=1001&akid=22751%2E444211%2EZCeBlj ]Beto for Texas

We just saw this tweet and had to share it with you: data analysts
studying Texas election results found that voters under age 30 are voting
in this election at rates 508% higher than in 2014!

This is great news for Beto’s campaign -- and we have to capture this
momentum. Fast. Whether Beto wins or loses in seven short days could come
down to a few thousand votes. We can’t let this opportunity pass us by.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181030&t=1020&akid=22751%2E444211%2EZCeBlj ]If you can afford it -- please rush
a contribution of
$3
or more to Beto’s campaign to mobilize millions of Texas voters in the
final week of this election.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181030&t=1021&akid=22751%2E444211%2EZCeBlj ]Contribute
$3
»

This news is more evidence of the historic spikes in voter turnout across
Texas. But we’re especially excited to see that more young Texans are
voting: our campaign is helping change who shows up to vote.

No political pollster would tell Beto it’s a good idea to campaign on
college campuses. But Beto knows young Texans are on the front lines of
the biggest fights of our time, and they have the power to help swing this
election. That’s why we’ve made it a priority to mobilize historic numbers
of young people to get involved in our campaign and vote for Beto.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181030&t=1022&akid=22751%2E444211%2EZCeBlj ]We have just seven short days until Election Day, and we’re counting
on your grassroots support to get even more Texans out to vote for Beto.
Help us get there by pitching in
$3
right now.

Thanks,

Team Beto

| | [EXPRESS DONATE $100 »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b5ce/2f5ea88d/7bc317b5/2cbd8cff/2531939296/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-power-the-blue-wave?utm_source=ema_2018-10-30_a-ballot&refcode=ema_2018-10-30_a-ballot&utm_campaign=a-ballot&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---|---
**[Or, donate another amount.](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b5ce/2f5ea88d/7bc317b5/2cbd8cfb/2531939296/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-power-the-blue-wave?utm_source=ema_2018-10-30_a-ballot&refcode=ema_2018-10-30_a-ballot&utm_campaign=a-ballot&utm_medium=ema")**
I haven't seen Washington voters fired up like this in a long time. In fact, at this point in 2014 only 8% of voters had returned their ballots. As of last Friday, 13.5% of voters had returned their ballots.
We win if we turn out our voters. And so far Democrats are turning out in historic numbers. It's why I'm so proud to be on Jay Inslee's team. Right here in Washington, and across the country, he's been building that progressive movement to take back our country and build on our razor-thin majorities in Washington state. Up and down the ballot, we're going to beat climate-denying Republicans -- and prove Americans are ready for a better path forward.
**But here's the bad news:** We're running up against our last major fundraising deadline before the election, and we're coming up short. We need to get our message out and keep the pressure on, and make sure EVERY progressive is ready to fight for our shared values.
[**Before midnight tomorrow, can you chip in $10 or more to help make sure we can power the movement we need to win next week?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b5ce/2f5ea88d/7bc317b5/2cbd8cfb/2531939296/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-power-the-blue-wave?utm_source=ema_2018-10-30_a-ballot&refcode=ema_2018-10-30_a-ballot&utm_campaign=a-ballot&utm_medium=ema")
Thanks for having Jay's back.
Sincerely,
Tracy Newman

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | **According to a new poll released today, Sherrod has lost ground.** We'll be frank with you Peter: too many people think we have this race locked up, but our opponent is surging in the polls. **This is NOT the time to be losing ground** \-- but according to a new poll, this single-digit race is only getting closer. | | | [Donate](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd1a/4462dc26/704db816/201f10a0/1989202378/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDMwcG0yIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181030pm2?refcode=sbe181030pm2_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
Jim Renacci and special interest groups are attacking Sherrod with nasty attacks. Trump's coming to town AGAIN on Monday.
We're sorry to bother you Peter, but this really can't wait. [**We need to raise another $54,953 to reach our final monthly goal of the election before midnight tomorrow to help turn out the vote.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd1a/4462dc26/704db816/201f10a0/1989202378/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDMwcG0yIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181030pm2?refcode=sbe181030pm2_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
[**Will you rush in a contribution? All gifts that come in before midnight will be TRIPLED.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd1a/4462dc26/704db816/201f10a0/1989202378/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDMwcG0yIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181030pm2?refcode=sbe181030pm2_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

**[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd1a/4462dc26/704db816/201f10a7/1989202378/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDMwcG0yIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181030pm2?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe181030pm2_m_10&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd1a/4462dc26/704db816/201f10a7/1989202378/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDMwcG0yIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181030pm2?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe181030pm2_m_26&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd1a/4462dc26/704db816/201f10a0/1989202378/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDMwcG0yIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181030pm2?refcode=sbe181030pm2_m_other&refcode2=3268183")**
This is a single-digit race. With less than a week before Election Day, every single dollar matters.
Sherrod wants nothing more than to continue his work, fighting like hell for Ohio families in the Senate. But the other side is pulling out all the stops to defeat him.
We have to do the same if we want to keep him where he is.
[**Peter, give what you can. Whatever you can give will have triple the impact.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd1a/4462dc26/704db816/201f10a0/1989202378/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDMwcG0yIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181030pm2?refcode=sbe181030pm2_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

Team Sherrod

name: MK
subject: first time ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
This is huge, friends: After hearing that the Republican Governors Association launched a HUGE ad buy against us, a group of generous donors is offering to TRIPLE every contribution - **but we only have until midnight tomorrow!**
I'll be honest - this couldn't have come at a more crucial moment. With the election just seven days away, we have to fight back against these attacks - but right now, we're still behind on our last $50,000 end-of-month fundraising goal.
**If we 're going to win this race, I need you to give anything you can spare right now - and have it go THREE TIMES AS FAR - to make sure we flip NH blue on Nov. 6.**
**Please, friends:[_Will you rush $5 or more right now - every dollar you can - to have your donation TRIPLED and help us win in New Hampshire?_](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4aa9/d0ce7de/50c8f890/9cdd3fc/2975770187/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTkxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk191-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
With right-wing dark money groups like the Koch network and RGA coming after me with everything they've got, we can't afford not to take full advantage of this critical match opportunity. Because unlike Chris Sununu, I'm only beholden to New Hampshire's working families - not corporations or special interests.
**But that means I 'm depending on grassroots supporters like you - now more than ever - to help me stay strong in the final days of this campaign. I won't be able to win on Nov. 6 unless you help us reach our must-hit $50,000 fundraising goal.**
**[_Rush $5 (becomes $15!) immediately - anything and everything you can contribute right now - and have your donation TRIPLED to flip New Hampshire blue and defeat Chris Sununu's corporate agenda._](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4aa9/d0ce7de/50c8f890/9cdd3fc/2975770187/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTkxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk191-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you so much for your support at this critical moment,

Molly

name: Bruce Sinclair
subject: We can't win if we run out of money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f109b/3e0906/75a0f411/3e371986/1639304695/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20181030_3_FR_BS_absentee-LDND&source=20181030_3_FR_BS_absentee-LDND")

| | Derek, there's a lot to celebrate tonight: Absentee ballots are at a record high and while we still have a few hours of important work to chase down all the ballot requests, we feel good. [Now it's time to Get Out the Vote for Tim Kaine and 11 House candidates.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f109b/3e0906/75a0f411/3e371999/1639304695/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181030_3_FR_BS_absentee-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Now+itrsquos+time+to+Get+Out+the+Vote+fo&utm_campaign=20181030_3_FR_BS_absentee-LDND&source=20181030_3_FR_BS_absentee-LDND") **We have exactly one week to talk to thousands of voters and turn out Democrats for the 2018 midterms in Virginia.** This is what your money goes towards: Getting votes. Your support helped us chase absentee ballots from Roanoke to Norfolk, and it's going to help us go back to those places and talk to their neighbors and get them to the polls on Election Day.

**But here 's the catch: We can't do that if we run out of money. **

Derek, please don't let us miss this goal tomorrow night. [As you can see, we need your help, whether that's in the form of $5 or more right now or forwarding this email:](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f109b/3e0906/75a0f411/3e37199c/1639304695/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181030_3_FR_BS_absentee-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+As+you+can+see+we+need+your+help+whether&utm_campaign=20181030_3_FR_BS_absentee-LDND&source=20181030_3_FR_BS_absentee-LDND") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f109b/3e0906/75a0f411/3e371991/1639304695/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181030_3_FR_BS_absentee-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20181030_3_FR_BS_absentee-LDND&source=20181030_3_FR_BS_absentee-LDND") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f109b/3e0906/75a0f411/3e371997/1639304695/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181030_3_FR_BS_absentee-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20181030_3_FR_BS_absentee-LDND&source=20181030_3_FR_BS_absentee-LDND")

clean_body: | "" | | Derek, there's a lot to celebrate tonight: Absentee ballots are at a record high and while we still have a few hours of important work to chase down all the ballot requests, we feel good. "" We have exactly one week to talk to thousands of voters and turn out Democrats for the 2018 midterms in Virginia. This is what your money goes towards: Getting votes. Your support helped us chase absentee ballots from Roanoke to Norfolk, and it's going to help us go back to those places and talk to their neighbors and get them to the polls on Election Day. But here 's the catch: We can't do that if we run out of money. Derek, please don't let us miss this goal tomorrow night.
